title: Nigel Farage’s Far-Right Party Is Now Central to British Politics
summary_full: Nigel Farage’s anti-immigrant, populist agenda has helped his party, Reform U.K., emerge from the fringe of politics in Britain. But it faces an uphill climb to win power.
summary_public: Nigel Farage’s anti-immigrant, populist agenda has helped his party, Reform U.K., emerge from the fringe of politics in Britain. But it faces an uphill climb to win power.

GB.label: negative
GB.evidence: Nigel Farage’s anti-immigrant, populist agenda has helped his party
